rules.checkpoint: Bounded source/config cluster suitable for an explicit scoped checkpoint.
rules.quarantine: Residue cluster that may be isolated later, but not auto-moved here.
rules.archive_review: Legacy or reference cluster requiring separate ownership review.
rules.manual_split_required: Active cluster too broad for one safe checkpoint and should be split further.

checkpoint_groups.label: docs_and_specs
checkpoint_groups.notes: Docs/specs are bounded and can be checkpointed separately.

checkpoint_groups.label: legacy_runtime
sample_paths: system_v5/READ ONLY Reference Docs/Older Legacy/Joshua Personality Model v1.1 copy.pdf
system_v5/READ ONLY Reference Docs/Older Legacy/Personality theory._ copy.xlsx
system_v5/READ ONLY Reference Docs/Older Legacy/The Dark Empress-A Practical Guide to Universal Dominion V6.1 copy.md
system_v5/READ ONLY Reference Docs/Older Legacy/The Grandmaster of the Universe.txt
checkpoint_groups.notes: Legacy/reference surfaces should be reviewed separately from active work.

checkpoint_groups.label: other_source
checkpoint_groups.notes: Unclassified source/config residue needs manual grouping before checkpointing.
